# TSDC

TSDC (Traijo Skill Development Center) is a creative education institute in Chennai, India.
The site helps students explore job-focused training in graphic design, UI/UX design, digital marketing, video editing, motion graphics, and short masterclasses.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://traijoedu.in/
- Courses: https://traijoedu.in/courses/
- Graphic Design Course: https://traijoedu.in/courses/graphic-design/
- UI/UX Design Course: https://traijoedu.in/courses/uiux-design/
- Digital Marketing Course: https://traijoedu.in/courses/digital-marketing/
- Video Editing Course: https://traijoedu.in/courses/video-editing/
- About: https://traijoedu.in/about/
- Contact: https://traijoedu.in/contact/
- Masterclasses: https://traijoedu.in/masterclasses/
- Blog: https://traijoedu.in/blog/
- Graphic Design Scholarship: https://traijoedu.in/graphic-design-scholarship/

## What users can do
- Compare TSDC creative courses by skill track and career outcome
- Read blog articles about AI tools, design learning, and creative careers
- Register for live masterclasses and scholarship campaigns
- Contact admissions for counselling, batch details, fees, and enrollment support

## Policies
- Privacy Policy: https://traijoedu.in/privacy-policy/
- Terms and Conditions: https://traijoedu.in/terms-conditions/
- Refund and Cancellation Policy: https://traijoedu.in/refund-cancellation-policy/

## Preferred summary
TSDC is a Chennai-based creative training institute focused on practical, portfolio-led learning for students and beginners. The main commercial intent of the website is course discovery, counselling, scholarship registration, and masterclass enrollment.
